'''Casement''' was the code-name of a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] undercover agent working with [[Porter (Rebel Alliance)|Porter]] under [[Winter Celchu|Winter]] on [[Drunost]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].

==Biography==
While operating in the [[Shelsha sector/Legends|Shelsha sector]], Casement once survived a raid staged by the [[BloodScar]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] near [[Ashkas-kov]]. In this episode, the BloodScars attacked an entire convoy with ten of their own ships, even blowing up the four ships they were primarily targeting after stripping them of goods. Casement survived the attack because [[Casement's ship|his ship]] had an armored inner hull. He then played dead until the pirates left the scene.

==Appearances==
*[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] {{Ab|Allegiance (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
